# Welcome {.unnumbered}

Welcome to the PARC Project-level Data Management Plan (DMP) User Guide. This guide contains all information for you to start documenting your project's data management in the PARC Project-level DMP template in the [PARC Data Stewardship Wizard](https://parc.ds-wizard.org/) (often abbreviated by the WP7 DMP Team as "the DSW"). 

We recommend you start with the following two videos:

* PARC Data Management Plan/Data Stewardship Wizard Instruction Video:

  {{< video https://youtu.be/hD7khvb3djk 
      aria-label="PARC Data Management Plan/Data Stewardship Wizard Instruction Video"
  >}}

* PARC Data Stewardship Wizard Walkthrough: 
   
  {{< video https://youtu.be/Di9WABMn0G0 
      aria-label="PARC Data Stewardship Wizard Walkthrough"
  >}}

Then continue creating/developing your project's DMP using this guide as reference. 

::: {.callout-note}
## PARC Handbook
Planning and deadlines for current and past projects can be found in the [PARC Handbook](https://agenceanses.sharepoint.com/:f:/r/sites/PARC-ANSES/Consortium/07-PARC%20Handbook?csf=1&web=1&e=ryWEAD).
:::
